Image originally from cultist simulator and in [[Catgirl Simulator]] used for one of the [[Nine aspects]] [[Category:Nine aspects]]
[[sn:Knock.svg]][[Category:Antibodies]]
[[sn:File:Knock.svg]][[sn:File:Knock.svg]][[Category:Gnosis]]
[[sn:File:Knock.svg]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
